title: Rattan Round Banneton Proving Basket - 10 Inch, Natural, Sourdough, Home & Professional Bakers (Cloth Liner, Dough Scraper, Bread Lame, Starter Recipe Set)
features: THE RIGHT SIZE: Diameter 10-inch(25cm), height 3.5-inch(8.75cm) allows for 1.5lbs(0.6kg) of dough for a medium to large size loaf.
PERFECT ARTISAN BREAD: Our banneton proofing basket made from natural rattan cane is proven to absorb some moisture away from the surface to create a lovely artisan crusty bread.
NATURAL RATTAN: Handmade, hand-craft unbleached high-quality natural rattan cane. No more wood splinters in your home baked bread!

PERFECT 5-PIECE SET: Bread proving basket, liner cloth, top quality flexible dough scraper and bread lame(The Bread Lame is very sharp, please use if carefully.), starter recipe, you will also get professional tips & tricks that are going to make you a better baker!

AFFORDABLE AND GREAT PRESENT:This bread proofing basket set is helpful for a baker and people who like to make fresh and healthy bread by themself. A housewife can make delicious for their little child and it will make much more funs to family.
description: Product Description Introducing FOTEMIX Premium Sourdough Proving Basket Are you a passionate home baker seeking to perfect your sourdough creations? Look no further! Our banneton proofing basket are meticulously designed to help you achieve artisanal, bakery-quality results right in your own kitchen. With a focus on craftsmanship, functionality, and exceptional performance, our proving basket are an essential tool for any bread enthusiast. Enhance Your Artisan Bread with Our Premium Rattan Proofing Basket Set Our bread proofing basket set, made from premium rattan cane, enhances the rustic charm of your sourdough loaves. As the dough dries it creates a skin, and this is what makes a superb traditional crust on artisan bread. Rattan's natural texture forms alluring spirals, yielding a delightful golden crust that's truly impressive.
